content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Balanced Playlist". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1237/problem/D
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of songs. The second line contains n integers, the durations of the songs.
content.outputFormat: Output the minimum difference between the total duration of the two parts of the playlist.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use dynamic programming to find the subset of songs that sums up to half of the total duration of all songs.
